name: Maple Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the gelatin in the cold water.
2. Heat milk, maple syrup, and salt in a double boiler until ready to use.
3. Slowly add the egg yolks to the heated mixture.
4. Add the dissolved gelatin to the mixture and let it cool.
5. Whip cream and flavor with vanilla; set half aside.
6. Fold the remaining whipped cream and egg whites into the cooled custard.
7. Pour into the baked pie shell, top with the reserved whipped cream, and refrigerate until well chilled.
